description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: may use the Custom Spell Voting Page when it is beneficial to coordinate voting without using the standard Spell process. The

must not use this method unless domain expert Ecosystem Actors in the Emergency Response Group have recommended this approach; such a recommendation must be explicitly documented in the communication channel specified in [A.1.8.1.3.1 - Emergency Response Signal Group](45a7ccff-09fa-4d95-b3d8-e3f34f7917cf).
